features: Plump up your lips - With our Face Facts Vitamin C Gel Lip Masks, which help to improve skin elasticity + reduce the appearance of fine lines.
Give lips a weekly treat - Skin on our lips is much thinner and more delicate so will soak-up skin loving ingredients.
Little lip masks - That feel just like cooling juicy jelly when applied and packed full of super-skin ingredients.
Collagen, Glycerin & Red Seaweed extract - All help lock in that much needed moisture and improve skin elasticity.
Vit C works its magic & leaves you lips plumped + smooth - Also prefect primer for the dreamy matte red or natural pout.
description: Product Description Plump up your lips with our jelly lip masks, they really do feel just like cooling juicy jelly when applied. Packed full of super-skin ingredients and vitamin C, that works its magic & leaves your lips plumped + smooth. They are also a perfect primer for your dreamy matte red lips on a night out or a natural pout on Zoom! Ingredients Liquid: Aqua, Glycerin, Dimethicone, Paraffinum Liquidum, Cetearyl Alcohol, Isopropyl Palmitate, 3-O-Ethyl Ascorbic Acid, Propylene Glycol, Sorbitan Stearate, Hydrolyzed Collagen, Phenoxyethanol. Gel Patch: Aqua, Glycerin, Chondrus Crispus Extract, Hydrolyzed Sclerotium Gum, Xanthan Gum, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Phenoxyethanol. Directions Apply the jelly mask over clean lips. Chill for 30 minutes then remove by peeling away from the edges. Use 1 to 2 times a week. Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. If irritation occurs, discontinue use and seek medical advice. Keep out of reach of children. See more
